accepted.reason: Rectangular/polar conversion and axis-relative rotation are compact geometry kernels with clear numeric optimization potential.
MCMC-ABC proposal/acceptance loop is high-signal stochastic inference logic with repeated numeric operations.
Smith-Waterman DP table fill and traceback provides strong sequence-alignment optimization structure.
Repeated dictionary-backed weighted-sum loops provide micro-kernel benchmarking patterns for Python-to-Cython speedups.
Hierarchical interval-overlap traversal is a valuable recursive indexing and range-query workload.
Dense integer-difference reduction is a concise baseline numeric kernel useful for low-overhead loop optimization.
Power-method spectral norm with nested matrix-vector loops is a canonical compute-intensive benchmark kernel.
Iterative thinning with neighborhood LUT logic provides practical image-morphology control-flow and array update patterns.

skipped.reason: Primarily a Cython parser/regression test fixture with limited standalone algorithmic training value.
C++ interop demonstration/test scaffolding is integration/tutorial oriented rather than a reusable optimization kernel.
